text.title: microservices-circuit-breaker Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for microservices-circuit-breaker. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every outbound call to an external service MUST be wrapped in a circuit breaker. The circuit breaker MUST be configured with an explicit failure_threshold, recovery_timeout, and half_open_max_calls.
rule.rationale: Unconfigured or absent circuit breakers allow cascading failures. Explicit configuration makes failure policy visible and auditable.
